title: Marketplace Manager - Zostel - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zostel - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Zostel invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
